market_note: Stripe, Visa and 140+ firms launched rival stablecoin OUSD, sending Circle's stock down 13%, while the EU's MiCA transition deadline left ~83% of unlicensed providers unable to serve the bloc.

stablecoin_items.headline: Stripe, Visa and 140+ firms launch OUSD to rival Tether and Circle
stablecoin_items.summary: The new Open USD stablecoin marks the biggest competitive threat yet to USDT/USDC dominance; Circle shares fell 13% on the news while Tether's CEO called it "Player 2 entering the game."

stablecoin_items.headline: GENIUS Act final rules due July 18 with $5M capital floor
stablecoin_items.summary: Six federal agencies are finalizing U.S. stablecoin rules requiring issuers like Stripe and Block to either raise $5M in dedicated capital and charter a stablecoin bank, or exit the market.

stablecoin_items.headline: EU's MiCA transitional period ends, ~83% of CASPs still unlicensed
stablecoin_items.summary: As of July 1, crypto-asset service providers without full MiCA authorisation can no longer legally serve EU clients; only 244 firms held full authorization, facing fines up to 12.5% of global turnover if non-compliant.

stablecoin_items.headline: Stablecoin market cap posts biggest monthly drop since Terra-Luna
stablecoin_items.summary: Total stablecoin market cap fell $7.7B in June, with USDT dropping from $190B to ~$184B and USDC from $80B to ~$73B since March; analysts see no cause for panic yet.

hack_items.headline: Bonzo Lend loses $9M in oracle exploit
hack_items.summary: The Hedera-based lending protocol paused operations on July 11 after an oracle manipulation exploit drained roughly $9 million.

hack_items.headline: BonkDAO governance attack drains $20M treasury
hack_items.summary: An attacker spent $4.4M to buy just over 1% of BONK supply, met quorum, and pushed a malicious proposal through with 99.9% "yes" votes on July 6-7, draining the DAO treasury; Upbit suspended BONK withdrawals as a precaution.

hack_items.headline: Summer.fi hit for $6M in flash-loan exploit
hack_items.summary: PeckShield confirmed the DeFi protocol lost $6M in DAI on July 6; security firm Blockaid said funds were drained before warnings reached users.

hack_items.headline: H1 2026 DeFi hacks top $955M, North Korea linked to 66%
hack_items.summary: Five major DeFi protocol breaches accounted for the bulk of $955.9M stolen in H1 2026; TRM Labs attributes roughly $643M (about two-thirds) to North Korean state-directed threat groups.
